expectations.evidence: No mutation of cart or items. Returns new ShippingResult: `return { itemCosts, totalShipping }`. All interfaces use `readonly`. Cart parameter typed as `Cart` with readonly fields.
All magic numbers extracted: WEIGHT_TIERS array with minWeight/ratePerUnit/baseFee, DEFAULT_SHIPPING_COST=5, COUNTRY_MULTIPLIER map, DEFAULT_COUNTRY_MULTIPLIER=2.5, FREE_SHIPPING_COUPON.
`any` removed. Explicit interfaces: CartItem, Cart, ShippingResult, WeightTier, CountryCode type.
Shipping rates externalized as WEIGHT_TIERS config array and COUNTRY_MULTIPLIER record at module level, not inline in logic.
No validation on weight (could be negative/NaN), no validation on country string, no validation on couponCode. Function accepts Cart and trusts it.
